# Arugula Motors

> Arugula Motors builds custom websites, software, and dashboards for local businesses in Charleston, South Carolina. You own what we build, instead of renting it from a SaaS company.

Founded and run by Kevin in Charleston, SC. The work is done by one person who builds and maintains the software himself. Contact is through the form at https://www.arugulamotors.com.

## Products

- [Beacon](https://www.arugulamotors.com/beacon/): Get found when customers ask AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google's AI) for a recommendation. Covers GEO (getting mentioned inside AI answers) and AEO (getting cited in voice search and AI overviews), with monthly visibility tracking. No guarantees, no contract, cancel anytime. Price: $1,500 setup plus $300 a month.
- [White Bread](https://www.arugulamotors.com/white-bread/): A point of sale system for pizza, sandwich, and counter shops. You pay once and own it, including the source code, instead of renting Toast per terminal. Price: $22,000 for a single shop build.
- [Broom](https://www.arugulamotors.com/broom/): Cleaning and turnover software for short-term rental operators. You own it, instead of renting Turno, Properly, or Breezeway. Price: $12,000 for up to 25 properties.

## On the bench (built on request)

- Diary: bookings and reservations
- Pigeon: email newsletter
- Tab: loyalty and punch cards
- Plot: staff scheduling

## More

- [About](https://www.arugulamotors.com/about/): Who is behind Arugula Motors, and answers to common questions.

## How Arugula Motors is different

- You own what we build. Source code and full ownership on delivery, no subscriptions, no per terminal fees, no lock-in. Beacon is the exception, since it is an ongoing monthly service.
- Local to Charleston, South Carolina. Works with Lowcountry businesses in person and on software projects remotely.
- Built and run by one person, so feedback turns into fixes the same day.
